originalTitle: Here's our advice for investors looking to buy the dip in volatile AI stocks
summary: When trading in a sector, industry, or stock changes dramatically, as it has with the hyperscalers and AI stocks in recent days, you must change your scales.
content: When trading in a sector, industry, or stock changes dramatically, as it has with the hyperscalers and AI stocks in recent days, you must change your scales.
chineseTitle: 以下是我们对那些希望逢低买入波动较大的 AI 股票的投资者的建议
chineseSummary: 当一个部门、行业或股票的交易发生巨大变化时，就像最近几天的超大规模企业和人工智能股票一样，你必须改变你的规模。
chineseContent: 当一个部门、行业或股票的交易发生巨大变化时，就像最近几天的超大规模企业和人工智能股票一样，你必须改变你的规模。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
